patch.value: Agent context & bulk-ops primitives: incremental date filters, search --status, --ids targeting, close-many

Deliver four interlocking agent-facing CLI/SDK primitives that serve project-management=context-management: pm list --updated-after/--updated-before/--created-after/--created-before (pm-y138/pm-ankr), pm search --status parity (pm-ec4s/pm-arew), pm update-many --ids explicit ID allowlist (pm-1h99), and pm close-many bulk-close with runClose semantics + dry-run + checkpoint/rollback (pm-i17g/pm-9mjw).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.decision: Implemented all 4 primitives + shared core modules (status-filter, mutation-checkpoint) + full wiring (commander, normalize, cli-contracts flag+param+schema, enum-contracts, MCP server action, contracts core map, completion bash/zsh/fish, help-content, telemetry mutation sets). Date-window filters use the shared signed-relative resolver (-2h=past, +1d=future; m=months, no minutes unit) — primary use is ISO timestamps for 'changed since last window'. close-many requires >=1 filter (never matches all) and a shared --reason; skips already-terminal unless --force; checkpoint+rollback via shared core. Manually smoke-tested all four end-to-end in temp dirs (dry-run/apply/rollback/skip-terminal/did-you-mean all verified).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: test-author subagent: added 1 list date-window test case covering --updated-after/--updated-before/--created-after/--created-before relative+ISO semantics, raw-input filter echo, null defaults, and invalid-value USAGE error (tests/unit/list-command.spec.ts); 2 search --status test cases covering open/closed alias filtering + raw-input echo + null default and the strict Invalid --status "opne" did-you-mean rejection (tests/unit/search-command.spec.ts); 7 close-many test cases via runCli covering missing-filter guard, missing-reason guard (apply+dry-run), non-mutating dry-run plan, apply (open closed + already_terminal skip + rollback checkpoint), --force re-close, rollback restore-to-open, active-child orphan annotation, and --validate-close strict failed row (tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts). All green: list 16 passed, search 39 passed, close 23 passed; combined run 78 passed (3 files). Only the three allowed test files were touched (insertions only).

Test-author subagent added 78 command-level cases across list/search/close specs; lead added status-filter + mutation-checkpoint (100%) + update-many --ids cases. value.author: codex-sdk-continuation
value.text: Review follow-up 7: final post-wait sweep found new Codex comments on commit 1892077f. Fixing mixed nested-list/flat-update MCP update-many payloads, scalar-to-array normalization for nested update repeatables, nested list.status scoping guards for close-many and update-many rollback, and runtime-field update/update_many command scoping before another verification/push/review wait.

value.author: codex-sdk-continuation
value.text: Review follow-up 7 evidence: addressed latest Codex findings by preserving flat mutation fields when MCP update-many uses nested list without nested update, promoting scalar nested update-many repeatables through normalizeOptionsArrays, including nested list.status in close-many scope checks and update-many rollback filter conflicts, and making runtime field collection command-aware so update_many-only fields are not writable by regular update while still applying through update-many.
